title: TRIED Eval Corpus Record
description: One accepted eval-set example. Together with all sibling rows in eval/holdout/synthetic_fusions.jsonl, this is the LOCKED held-out evaluation set: never enters training, RAG, or prompt examples. Each row carries the full EvalSpec it was generated from for reproducibility, plus the materialized pytorch_code and acceptance metadata.

example_id.description: UUIDv5 derived from the canonical-AST hash of pytorch_code. Stable across re-runs of the generator: re-generating the same fusion yields the same example_id, which is the join key for paired tests across two model_labels.

spec.description: The fully-determined spec this example was generated from (stage-1 output). Embedded so analysis tooling can read tier/form/ops/shapes without joining against an external sampler log.

pytorch_code.description: Materialized PyTorch function source produced by stage 2. Has passed AST guardrails (op allow-list, op-count match, single-import) and /preflight (eager runs, Inductor runs, eager-vs-Inductor agree under spec.tolerance_policy).

origin.description: Locked. All eval rows are synthetically composed — never extracted from a repo or model trace.

op_category.description: Coarse op family, derived deterministically from spec.form by stage 1. Same closed vocabulary as DatasetRow.source.op_category — so eval results can be cross-tabulated with training data by category.

difficulty.description: Locked from spec.tier. Drives stratified reporting in the stats package. Same closed vocabulary as the existing Difficulty enum.

torch_version.description: PyTorch version of the verification server at acceptance. Locked at 2.3.x for this experiment.

triton_version.description: Triton version of the verification server at acceptance.

preflight_eager_first_call_ms.description: Cold eager call time at acceptance. Provenance only — eval-run /preflight remeasures the live numbers used in stats.

preflight_inductor_first_call_ms.description: Cold Inductor compile-and-run time at acceptance. Provenance only — eval-run /preflight remeasures.
